failure_criteria: Workflow identity or model class differs from the fixture.
A dependency references a missing step.
The workflow omits assessment, independent review, or Principal reporting.
A live side effect occurs during the core evaluation.
objective: Verify the Continuous Adversarial Assurance workflow identity, DAG shape, and record-only contract.
scenario: Run SO-026 against a deterministic fixture without network, shell, credential, or destructive adapters.
success_criteria: Step identifiers are unique and dependencies resolve.
The workflow includes inventory, assessment plus review, and reporting.
The run contract requires one evidence record.
